/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,go2_interface_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.cpython-38-aarch64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/go2_interface/go2_interface_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.cpython-38-aarch64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/go2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/go2_interface/_go2_interface_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/mybotshop/build/go2_interface/rosidl_generator_py/go2_interface:/opt/mybotshop/build/go2_interface:/opt/ros/foxy/lib rosidl_generator_py/go2_interface/libgo2_interface__python.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so libgo2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so libgo2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcpputils.so libgo2_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so
